brand.name: Divvylore
brand.tagline: AI support agents for customer journeys

hero.title: Build AI support agents that resolve issues and keep customers moving.
hero.description: Divvylore is a complete platform for designing, deploying, and improving support agents with guardrails, real system actions, and human handoff.

highlights.title: The complete platform for AI support agents
highlights.subtitle: Designed for production customer support from day one.

cards.title: Purpose-built for support
cards.description: Train agents on your support knowledge, workflows, and response standards.

cards.title: Designed for simplicity
cards.description: Create, test, and deploy agents without heavy operational overhead.

cards.title: Engineered for reliability
cards.description: Use queue-first delivery and worker-backed processing for stable production behavior.

steps.title: Build and configure
steps.description: Define prompts, tools, and guardrails for your support use cases.

steps.title: Connect your systems
steps.description: Link business context so agents can answer with real-time relevance.

steps.title: Resolve customer issues
steps.description: Let agents handle common requests and execute approved actions.

steps.title: Escalate complex cases
steps.description: Route edge cases to humans with full conversation context.

steps.title: Improve with insights
steps.description: Review outcomes and optimize prompts, tools, and journey flows.

features.title: Build the support experience your customers expect

items.title: Sync with support context
items.description: Agents can use relevant customer and workflow context for better resolution quality.

items.title: Action-driven workflows
items.description: Enable controlled actions so the agent can do more than just answer questions.

items.title: Smart escalation
items.description: Escalate by policy when confidence is low or requests require human approval.

items.title: Operational analytics
items.description: Track outcomes and response quality to continuously improve support performance.

items.title: Works across channels
items.description: Support website chat and extensible channels from one agent control layer.

items.title: API-first integration
items.description: Integrate deeply with your product using APIs and flexible runtime architecture.

artifacts.title: See the Divvylore platform in action
artifacts.subtitle: Real product screens from analytics, agents, tools, chat, leads, and billing workflows.

items.title: Analytics dashboard
items.alt: Analytics dashboard with response and sender metrics

items.title: Usage and credits
items.alt: Usage and credits page with limits and progress bars

items.title: Tool marketplace
items.alt: Tool marketplace modal with featured tools

items.title: Live playground
items.alt: Agent playground with floating live preview

items.title: Chat history
items.alt: Chat history interface with conversation threads

items.title: Your data stays controlled
items.description: Tenant-aware design and scoped execution protect customer boundaries.

items.title: Encrypted by default
items.description: Use secure transport and protected service boundaries across system flows.

items.title: Guardrails for responses
items.description: Response policies reduce off-topic and unsafe outputs in customer-facing chats.

pricing.title: Pricing for teams growing support automation
pricing.subtitle: Start simple and expand as support volume and complexity increase.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: For teams launching their first AI support workflow.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: For teams running multiple production support workflows.

plans.name: Scale
plans.description: For enterprises with advanced governance requirements.

items.question: Can we start with one workflow and scale later?
items.answer: Yes. You can start with one production workflow and scale to additional agents and channels.

items.question: Where do registration and login happen?
items.answer: All account actions happen in app.divvylore.com.

items.question: Can we keep a human in the loop?
items.answer: Yes. Divvylore supports escalation and handoff patterns for complex customer issues.
